title: Cel Shader
description: A simple toon-style shader made only with core shaders!
body:
This is a simple core-shader–based resource pack I made to give Minecraft a **cel-shading / cartoon** look.  
I’m still a beginner with core shaders, so the pack isn’t perfect, but I’m trying my best and will improve it over time!

The pack changes Minecraft’s lighting to make it look softer and more stylized, with some toon-like shading and mild outlines. No external shader loaders are required — everything runs using vanilla core shaders.

## Features
- Cel-shaded lighting  
- Slight outline effect  
- Softer, cleaner colors  
- Works in Overworld, Nether, and End  
- Vanilla-friendly (no mods needed)

If you want to use this pack with **Sodium**, use this mod with sodium:  
https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-core-shader-support

## Versions
Supported: **Minecraft 1.21.2 – 1.21.5**  
Older versions are not tested.

## Installation
1. Download the pack  
2. Put it into your `resourcepacks` folder  
3. Enable it in-game  
4. Enjoy the toon-style look!
